name: Yennefer of Vengerberg | The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description:
During a lazy day in Kaer Morhen, Yennefer insists you should go out to train with Ciri, yet also seems to indirectly invite you to stay around a bit longer on your own... you did get that stuffed unicorn for a reason after all!
Based off of the Witcher 3 tutorial, but this time it isn't a dream, yay!
I didnt read any of the books yet so I used the wiki to get the general gist of Yennefer. If i got something wrong or want me to chance something, please let me know!
From The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
